text.title: Technical Debt Management Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying technical debt management end-to-end.

step.name: inventory
step.action: Collect debt candidates from incident root-causes + engineering nominations + hotspots.

step.name: score-impact
step.decision-gate: If any item has paydown_effort_days <= 0, reject.

step.name: write-capacity-contract
step.decision-gate: If percent_of_sprint <5%, reject — contract is too weak.

step.name: attach-prevention
step.action: For each item, attach a prevention policy (lint, CR rule, CI gate).
step.decision-gate: Block item from paydown if prevention_policy empty.
